title: Read-only polyrepo scan report
outcome: Read-only polyrepo scan report: scan.schema.json (draft-07) + archon_emit_scan (lib/registry.sh) + bin/archon-scan writing registry/scan.json + registry/SCAN.md, dispatched via archon scan + moon archon:scan. Per workspace: path, kind, git_root, remote_set, default_branch, active_branch, worktree_status (state/changed/worktrees), native_manifests (descriptor ∪ detected), lint_check_commands, agent_scope_rules (per-profile in_scope/blocked, WS_ROOT-basename prefix normalized). _validate_scan added to the gate; SCAN.md gitignored. All state from read-only git -C <dir>; no writes outside registry/, no remote ops.
validation: moon run archon:scan produced one report over all 6 Build/src/workspaces/* repos (3 clean, 3 dirty); wfos resolves in_scope for all 3 profiles, unrelated repos empty. moon run archon:validate PASS including scan.json (6 workspaces) valid.
decisions: scan report is a generated, gitignored registry cache (scan.json + SCAN.md); the schema is tracked
profile scope globs normalized by stripping the WS_ROOT basename prefix before matching scan paths
token_note: one ~5.5KB scan.json / ~950B SCAN.md replaces per-repo status+remote+branch reads across 6 repos — measured: six raw git status outputs sum ~1.1KB of status text alone; SCAN.md packs status plus remotes/branches/manifests. Complements measured rtk gain on git status/log (docs/git-hygiene.md#token-cost-measured)
